creator: rich@enterprisesystems.net
text:
The HPE ProLiant ML10 Gen9 with Xeon E3-1225V5 3.3GHz Processor 4GB DDR4 RAM
GigE, and 1TB HDD and DVD-writer does not show any BSD media available for
boot(Install) DVD, CD, USB Memstick Freebsd 10.3 i386 11.1 i386 7.4 i386.
Tried loading bsd on HDD and using it no help
